short_blurb: Licensed roofing for Glendale homes, HOAs, and commercial buildings.
local_note: Glendale's mix of hillside homes, historic neighborhoods like Rossmoyne, and commercial corridors along Brand Boulevard means we handle a wide range of roofing systems. Verdugo Woodlands and the foothill neighborhoods need serious attention to ember-resistant assemblies and Class A fire ratings — we install the right underlayment, metal drip edge, and ember-resistant venting for fire-zone homes.

faqs.q: Are Glendale foothill homes in a fire hazard zone?
faqs.a: Much of Verdugo Woodlands, Adams Hill, and areas adjacent to the Verdugo Mountains are in Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zones. These homes require Class A roofs, ember-resistant venting, and Chapter 7A compliance. We specialize in these assemblies.
